summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WaveWatch iteration 9 features. Backend APIs 94.7% success rate, frontend functionality ~95% success rate. All major features working correctly including ContentCard hover buttons, navigation menu changes, dashboard recommendations, messages page, and footer platform reviews.

minor_bugs.issue: Connection reset by peer error during testing
minor_bugs.impact: Endpoint functionality unclear due to connection issue

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error instead of expected 400 for invalid recipient
minor_bugs.impact: Error handling not optimal but functionality works

design_issues.issue: Some 401 errors in browser console from unauthenticated API calls

passed_tests: Logo sizing: Navigation h-10 md:h-14, Footer h-12
Menu content removal: Sports, Documentaires, Spectacles from Content menu
Menu content removal: Jeux, Demandes from Media menu
Menu content removal: Realisations from User menu
ContentCard hover: Eye and Plus buttons side by side
ContentCard toggle: Eye button adds/removes from history
Dashboard recommendations section with content cards
Dashboard rating bars functionality (Votre avis compte)
Messages page at /messages with compose form and tabs
Admin page accessibility with all tabs
